name: astra-treasury-protocol
description: AstraTreasury Protocol starter repo: AI-assisted, rule-bound treasury token prototype for Base Sepolia.

scripts.submit:paper:latest:base-sepolia: echo 'Use the approval queue: npm run queue:approve -- latest, then APPROVE_PAPER_SIGNAL=YES npm run submit:paper:approved:base-sepolia' && exit 1
scripts.release:prepare: npm run compile:local && npm run release:manifest && npm run release:check
scripts.test:audit: npm run compile:local && npm run foundry:test
scripts.audit:prepare: npm run release:prepare && npm run audit:invariants && npm run ops:status
scripts.audit:full: npm run release:prepare && npm run audit:invariants && npm run audit:stateful && npm run audit:local-fuzz && npm run safe:prepare && npm run ops:status
scripts.audit:local-fuzz:deep: LOCAL_FUZZ_SEQUENCES=25 LOCAL_FUZZ_STEPS=60 hardhat run scripts/local-stateful-fuzz.ts --build-profile production
scripts.safe:prepare: npm run safe:plan:validate && npm run safe:dry-run:roles
scripts.mainnet:dry-run:gate: npm run mainnet:runbook:validate && npm run safe:prepare && npm run audit:full
scripts.audit:intake:gate: npm run audit:intake:validate && npm run audit:full && npm run mainnet:runbook:validate && npm run ops:status && npm run domain:check
scripts.audit:outreach:gate: npm run audit:outreach:validate && npm run audit:intake:gate
scripts.audit:selection:gate: npm run audit:selection:validate && npm run audit:outreach:gate && npm run audit:intake:gate && npm run audit:full && npm run domain:check
scripts.audit:kickoff:gate: npm run audit:kickoff:validate && npm run audit:selection:gate && npm run audit:intake:gate && npm run audit:full && npm run domain:check
scripts.audit:selection-exec:gate: npm run audit:start:manifest && npm run audit:selection-exec:validate && npm run audit:kickoff:gate && npm run domain:check
scripts.audit:remediation:gate: npm run audit:tracker:report && npm run audit:kickoff:gate
scripts.audit:public:gate: npm run audit:remediation:gate && npm run docs:audit-public
scripts.legal:review:gate: npm run legal:review:validate && npm run audit:full && npm run domain:check
scripts.legal:selection:gate: npm run legal:selection:validate && npm run legal:review:gate && npm run audit:full && npm run domain:check
scripts.governance:gate:run: npm run governance:gate:validate && npm run governance:gate:status
scripts.governance:gate:full: npm run governance:gate:run && npm run legal:selection:gate && npm run audit:selection-exec:gate && npm run audit:remediation:gate && npm run safe:prepare && npm run mainnet:runbook:validate && npm run ops:status && npm run domain:check
scripts.governance:public:gate: npm run governance:gate:full && npm run docs:governance-public
scripts.transparency:public:gate: npm run docs:audit-public && npm run docs:governance-public && npm run docs:transparency-public
scripts.mainnet:dry-run:v1:gate: npm run mainnet:dry-run:v1 && npm run audit:full && npm run governance:gate:full && npm run ops:status && npm run domain:check
scripts.mainnet:commands:v1:gate: npm run mainnet:commands:v1 && npm run mainnet:dry-run:v1:gate
scripts.safe:payloads:v1:gate: npm run safe:payloads:v1 && npm run mainnet:commands:v1:gate
scripts.mainnet:final-go-no-go:gate: npm run mainnet:final-go-no-go:validate && npm run mainnet:commands:v1:gate && npm run safe:payloads:v1:gate && npm run audit:full && npm run governance:gate:full && npm run ops:status && npm run domain:check
scripts.mainnet:approval:preflight: npm run mainnet:approval:status && npm run mainnet:final-go-no-go:gate && npm run mainnet:commands:v1:gate && npm run safe:payloads:v1:gate
scripts.mainnet:final-preflight:approved: ASTRA_REQUIRE_MAINNET_APPROVAL=YES hardhat run scripts/mainnet-final-preflight.ts --build-profile production --network baseMainnet
scripts.mainnet:deployment-session:preflight: npm run mainnet:approval:preflight && npm run mainnet:final-preflight
scripts.mainnet:deployment-session:preflight-app: npm run mainnet:approval:status && npm run mainnet:final-preflight:approved
scripts.mainnet:deployment-session:gate: npm run mainnet:deployment-session:plan && npm run mainnet:deployment-session:preflight && npm run mainnet:final-go-no-go:gate && npm run safe:payloads:v1:gate
scripts.mainnet:live:gate: npm run governance:gate:status && npm run docs:mainnet-public && npm run docs:governance-public && npm run docs:live-public && npm run docs:transparency-public && npm run docs:packages-public
scripts.mainnet:restricted:gate: npm run mainnet:restricted:validate && npm run mainnet:restricted:status && npm run mainnet:live:gate
scripts.mainnet:execution:gate: npm run mainnet:monitor:once && npm run mainnet:restricted:gate && npm run mainnet:execution:status
scripts.mainnet:alerts:gate: npm run mainnet:events:once && npm run mainnet:alerts:status
scripts.incident:gate: npm run mainnet:alerts:gate && npm run incident:sync && npm run incident:report
scripts.mainnet:launch:gate: npm run mainnet:monitor:once && npm run mainnet:events:once && npm run mainnet:alerts:status && npm run incident:sync && npm run incident:report && npm run mainnet:restricted:gate && npm run mainnet:execution:status && npm run mainnet:launch:status
scripts.announcement:gate: npm run mainnet:launch:gate && npm run announcement:validate && npm run announcement:public
scripts.announcement:publication:gate: npm run announcement:gate && npm run mainnet:launch:gate && npm run announcement:publication:status
scripts.post:announcement:gate: npm run announcement:publication:gate && npm run post:announcement:status
scripts.stabilization:gate: npm run public:refresh:once && npm run evidence:archive:once && npm run stabilization:status
scripts.roadmap:gate: npm run roadmap:validate && npm run roadmap:status
scripts.token:metadata:gate: npm run token:metadata && test -f public-docs/assets/token/astratoken-logo-256.png && test -f public-docs/token-status.json && test -f public-docs/astratreasury-tokenlist.json
scripts.wallet:gate: npm run token:metadata:gate && npm run wallet:metadata
scripts.brand:gate: npm run token:metadata:gate && npm run brand:kit
scripts.market:gate: npm run token:metadata:gate && npm run market:status
scripts.website:professional:gate: npm run trust:gate && npm run website:professional

scripts.treasury:funding:gate: npm run treasury:funding:validate && npm run treasury:funding:status

scripts.disclosures:gate: npm run disclosures:validate && npm run disclosures:status
scripts.treasury:risk:gate: npm run treasury:risk:validate && npm run treasury:risk:status

scripts.treasury:safe:gate: npm run treasury:safe:validate && npm run treasury:safe:status

scripts.dex:pool-existence-precheck:gate: npm run dex:pool-existence-precheck:check && npm run dex:pool-existence-precheck:validate && npm run dex:pool-existence-precheck:status
scripts.dex:pool-creation-approval:gate: npm run dex:pool-creation-approval:validate && npm run dex:pool-creation-approval:status
